sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
key_deliverables: EKS Cluster; RDS with pgvector; Auth Service with MFA; User Registration UI
demo_objectives: Show EKS scaling; Demonstrate User Login/MFA; Show DB Connectivity
success_criteria: Infra provisioned via Terraform; User can login with MFA; CI/CD pipeline active
risk_factors: AWS Limits; IAM Permission complexity; Amplify state management
mitigation_strategies: Request limit increases early; Use mock auth for frontend dev
